text: Standing in this environment, I am engulfed by an atmosphere of curiosity and creativity. The glass walls invite transparency while also highlighting the boundaries between spaces—physical, mental, and institutional. Moving into the R+D room, I feel an invigorating pulse of innovation and inquiry. The interplay of technology, text, and design sparks a quiet optimism in me—there is potential here for reflection, collaboration, and disruptive thought. I am both participant and observer in a living experiment, aware of the limitless questions that spring from these purposeful arrangements.
